news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric researcher Dr. Stefano Di Cairano named IEEE Fellow; honored among 420,000 professionals worldwide.
news.summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corporation in Tokyo revealed that Dr. Stefano Di Cairano from Mitsubishi Electric Research Laboratories, Inc. in Cambridge, MA, USA, has been honored with the prestigious title of IEEE Fellow. The Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers, representing around 420,000 professionals in electrical engineering and ICT worldwide, selects less than 0.1% of its voting members as fellows each year for exceptional contributions.

news.headline: Macron aims to unite Europe, Ukraine, and Trump on peace talks.
Trust Stamp partners with Digital Platformer to enhance security in digital identity and financial services by combining advanced verification and decentralized security solutions.
news.summary: Trust Stamp and Digital Platformer have joined forces in a strategic partnership to provide a comprehensive solution integrating Trust Stamp's advanced identity verification features with Digital Platformer's state-of-the-art decentralized security offerings. This collaboration aims to enhance security measures and streamline processes, offering users an all-encompassing solution.

news.headline: Bitcoin and Dogecoin weak, Ethereum rebounds. BTC at $95,608.82, ETH at $2,726.70. Market cap at $3.17 trillion.
news.summary: Bitcoin remained between $95,000 and $97,000 with a 0.80% drop, Ethereum surged by 2.10% reaching $2,726.70, while Dogecoin fell by 3.67% hitting $0.2567. Bitcoin's dominance rose to 59.8% with a 3.16% increase, while liquidations totaled $238 million in 24 hours, majorly in long positions amounting to $150 million. Bitcoin's Open Interest rose by 1.58%, signifying potential future volatility. Market sentiment was neutral, with a rise in long positions for Bitcoin compared to short positions. Top gainers were Sonic (+12.82%), Berachain (+8.01%), and Maker (+5.42%). The global crypto market cap was $3.17 trillion, down by 0.92% in 24 hours.

news.headline: G5ive Restaurant Group, led by Louisiana entrepreneur Cory Griffin, aims to acquire TGI Fridays in ownership consortium.
news.summary: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, on February 17, 2025, G5ive Restaurant Group, led by 30-year-old African American entrepreneur Cory Griffin from Louisiana, is gaining attention for its bold strategy to purchase TGI Fridays via a coalition of owners. This acquisition marks a substantial advancement for the group and signifies Griffin's notable initiative in the industry.

news.headline: Southwest to reduce corporate jobs by 15% in debut layoff.
Morehouse College honors John Hope Bryant with "Candle Award," raising $6.8 million for scholarships at 37th Gala.
news.summary: The 37th edition of the "A Candle in the Dark" Gala in Atlanta garnered an impressive $6.8 million in donations for student scholarships. The event, held on February 17, 2025, celebrated the achievements of John Hope Bryant, the esteemed Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Operation HOPE. This gala showcased a blend of inspiration and generosity, highlighting the commitment to supporting educational opportunities for students.

news.headline: Whirlpool Corp appoints John Morikis, former Sherwin-Williams CEO, to board of directors. Effective immediately.
news.summary: In Benton Harbor, Michigan on February 17, 2025, the board of directors at Whirlpool Corporation made a significant announcement regarding the appointment of John Morikis. Previously the chairman and CEO of The Sherwin-Williams Company, Morikis has been selected to join the board with immediate effect. He will be contributing to various aspects of the company, including corporate governance and nominating procedures. This decision reflects Whirlpool's strategic vision for growth and leveraging Morikis's expertise.

news.headline: Marine Sensors Market valued at $1.9 billion by 2028, with a CAGR of 6.5% driven by demand for UUV's and AUV's. Over 200 tables and 50 figures in-depth analysis available. Key players include Honeywell International Inc., Eaton Corporation, TE Connectivity, Garmin Ltd., and Curtiss Wright. OEM segment expected to reach $1.1 billion by 2028. The market growth in Asia Pacific is attributed to significant investments in R&D activities and technological advancements.
news.summary: The Marine Sensors Market is projected to increase from USD 1.4 Billion in 2023 to USD 1.9 Billion by 2028, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.5% during the same period. The industry is primarily driven by factors such as rising demand for UUV's and AUV's, increased maritime transportation, and the focus on advanced marine vessels by navies. However, the development of sensors capable of withstanding harsh marine conditions poses a challenge due to factors like high seawater salinity, varying temperatures, increasing pressure with depth, and biofouling. The market includes key players like Honeywell International Inc., Eaton Corporation, TE Connectivity, Garmin Ltd., and Curtiss Wright. The OEM segment is expected to reach USD 1.1 Billion by 2028, growing at a CAGR of 6.1% from 2023 to 2028. Key opportunities in the market include safety and security enhancements, technological advancements, new product launches, and contracts. The growth in Asia Pacific is attributed to significant R&D investments and technological advancements.

news.headline: Cloudsway introduces AI solutions using DeepSeek R1/V3 models for enterprise innovation. Singapore, Feb 18 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Cloudsway, a reputable provider of distributed AI infrastructure, revealed its commitment to enabling enterprise users to seamlessly integrate full-powered DeepSeek R1/V3 models. This support allows businesses to deploy advanced AI solutions customized to their unique requirements.

news.headline: Mobicom Corporation partners with Circles to launch AI-powered platform Xplore in Central Asia after success in 4 markets.
news.summary: Xplore, a digital platform created in collaboration with telcos worldwide, has officially launched in Central Asia. This move comes after its successful introduction in four different markets. Mobicom Corporation, the leading mobile network operator in Mongolia, revealed a key partnership on February 17, 2025.

news.headline: EnWave to announce Q1 financial results on Feb 24, 2025. Report to include data up to Dec 31, 2024. Check SEDAR for info.
news.summary: EnWave Corporation, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed that it is scheduled to release its financial results for the initial quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, on Monday, February 24, 2025, before the start of trading. The Company (TSX-V:ENW | FSE:E4U) will make the financial statements and MD&A accessible on SEDAR at www.sedarplus.ca and on its official website.

news.headline: china c.bank injects 489.2 billion yuan via 7-day reverse repos at 1.50% vs prior 1.50% - statement
China requires a robust private sector now more than ever, stated by Hong. #ChinaEconomy #PrivateSectorStrength
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 has reached over 5 million worldwide. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 300,000 globally. These figures highlight the continued spread and impact of the virus on a global scale. Despite efforts to contain the virus through various measures such as lockdowns and social distancing, the numbers continue to rise. The situation remains fluid as countries work to flatten the curve and mitigate the effects of the pandemic on their populations. Stay updated for more information on this evolving situation.

news.headline: Anonymous source sends $2M in ETH to WikiLeaks, claiming ‘brain-computer weapons’. Chinese programmer sends 711.5 Ether with military message.
news.summary: A programmer from China recently sent a significant amount of 711.5 Ether to WikiLeaks, along with a strange on-chain message regarding his country’s military.

news.headline: Hamilton Island Enterprises chooses 11 Agilysys solutions to enhance guest experiences and operational efficiencies, located in Whitsunday Islands. (char count: 116)
news.summary: Agilysys, a prominent hospitality software provider (Nasdaq: AGYS), recently disclosed that Hamilton Island Enterprises (HIE) opted for a set of Agilysys solutions. These will elevate guest experiences and operational efficiencies on the picturesque Hamilton Island, situated in the Whitsunday Islands, amidst the Great Barrier Reef. Known as Australia's premier destination, Hamilton Island's partnership with Agilysys is expected to bring about notable enhancements to its services.

news.headline: Two new communities in Oklahoma City by LGI Homes are now open for homebuyers.
news.summary: The latest information reveals that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.6%, with 1.8 million jobs added in the past month. The stock market also experienced a surge, reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Additionally, the GDP growth rate has been reported at 6.5%, signaling a strong economic recovery. These positive indicators suggest a promising outlook for the country's economy in the coming months.

news.headline: Cirrus unveils 2025 SR Series G7 Australis Edition aircraft for Australian pilots. CEO Zean Nielsen shared excitement.
news.summary: In Duluth, Minnesota and Brisbane, Australia, Cirrus Aircraft Ltd has announced the launch of the 2025 SR Series G7 Australis® Edition aircraft. This edition, specifically tailored for the challenging climate and remote flight conditions often encountered by Australian pilots, marks the third release of the Australis Edition. "We are thrilled to introduce the 2025 Australis Edition aircraft to the aviation community in Australia," stated Zean Nielsen, the CEO of Cirrus. The aircraft, designed to address the unique needs of Australian pilots, incorporates design elements from previous models.

news.headline: LG will showcase expanded "Fit & Max" kitchen solutions with zero clearance at KBIS 2025, leveraging innovative technologies.
news.summary: A state-of-the-art kitchen solution named "Fit & Max" will be unveiled by LG Electronics at the 2025 Kitchen and Bath Industry exhibit in Seoul, South Korea on February 18, 2025. The innovative product blends the company's advanced technologies and design expertise to provide consumers with an enhanced culinary experience.

news.headline: TIER IV completes robotaxi pilot tests in Tokyo for commercialization, using open-source software for autonomous driving.
news.summary: In Tokyo on February 17, 2025, TIER IV, known for developing the world's first open-source autonomous driving software, has achieved a milestone by completing pilot tests for a robotaxi service in the city. This marks a significant step towards commercialization.

news.headline: Chinafy and Lianwei form partnership in Q1 2025 for web optimization and compliance services in China.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 17, 2025, Chinafy, a prominent cross-border web optimization platform, and Lianwei, a reputable provider of security and compliance consulting services, revealed their plan for a strategic partnership starting in the first quarter of 2025. This collaboration aims to support multinational corporations in enhancing their online presence and ensuring adherence to security and compliance standards.

news.headline: LG Display starts mass production of 45-inch Gaming OLED monitor panel with 5K2K resolution to target gaming market.
news.summary: LG Display, based in Seoul, South Korea, revealed on February 17, 2025, that they have initiated large-scale production of a 45-inch Gaming OLED monitor panel featuring an impressive 5K2K resolution. This cutting-edge display technology is set to revolutionize the gaming experience with its ultra-high quality. LG Display, known globally for its innovative display solutions, is leading the way with this new advancement in visual technology.

news.headline: Hyundai IONIQ 5 N TA Spec sets new EV record at 'Attack Tsukuba 2025' in 57.446 seconds driven by Nobuteru Taniguchi.
news.summary: Hyundai's performance division, Hyundai N, achieved a new record for the fastest electric vehicle (EV) at the 'Attack Tsukuba 2025' event using the IONIQ 5 N TA (Time Attack) Spec. Professional driver Nobuteru Taniguchi piloted the vehicle, completing the circuit in an impressive 57.446 seconds. This time surpassed the previous EV record, showcasing the impressive capabilities of the IONIQ 5 N TA Spec in competitive racing environments.

news.headline: Whirlpool Corp declares $1.75 quarterly dividend per share on common stock, payable March 15, 2025.
news.summary: In Benton Harbor, Michigan, the Whirlpool Corporation's board of directors announced a quarterly dividend of $1.75 per share on their common stock. This dividend will be paid out on March 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the closing date.

news.headline: Unknown coder burns $7M worth of Ethereum to signal against brain chip 'mind control', claiming military manipulation.
news.summary: A programmer, who chose to remain unidentified, transferred millions in cryptocurrency to addresses with no way to access the funds. The individual also made bold claims that the military is leveraging brain-computer interfaces to manipulate and govern the populace.

news.headline: Coinbase surpasses Q4 earnings expectations, revenue surges by 138%, stock rebounds.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, Coinbase reported earnings and revenue gains exceeding expectations by triple digits. The company's revenue surged by 138%, surpassing estimates. Following this positive news, the stock price of COIN rebounded above a key moving average.

news.headline: Oil prices remain steady as OPEC+ considers postponing supply hike. - Financial news outlet.
IOTA unveils Business Innovation Program to enhance mainnet applications, providing funding and resources for projects.
news.summary: A fresh initiative has been revealed by the IOTA Foundation to aid businesses in creating practical applications on the IOTA Rebased Mainnet. This initiative provides funding and resources to support innovative projects. For further details, visit the original source.

news.headline: Dow Jones up, Intel soared after JD Vance's AI talk. Tesla dives w/ Elon Musk fears; Apple rallied. Warren Buffett stocks near entries.
news.summary: The Dow Jones index experienced an increase today, with Intel witnessing a significant rise following remarks on AI by JD Vance. Conversely, Tesla saw a decline in its stock market performance amid concerns related to Elon Musk. On a positive note, Apple showed a strong rally. Notably, 3 Warren Buffett stocks are approaching potential entry points according to the latest.

news.headline: Stock market rallies more than 1%, Nasdaq up 1.5%, IBD 50 ETF breaks out. Record highs in sight.
news.summary: The Nasdaq experienced a 1.5% increase while the IBD 50 ETF saw a breakout. The stock market surged over 1%, bringing record highs into close reach.

news.headline: Midland Exploration grants 800,000 stock options at $0.33 per share to employees, making total of 7,060,000 options.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Midland Exploration Inc. revealed that it provided incentive stock options to employees, directors, and officers to purchase a total of 800,000 common shares at a rate of $0.33 each share, valid for 10 years. This move aligns with Midland's stock option plan. With this recent allocation, the company now has 7,060,000 stock options in circulation.

news.headline: Companies in energy sector might benefit from 'drill, baby, drill' policy. Stocks could rise due to tariffs.
Dr. MJ Chung donates $7.5 million for "MJ Chung Distinguished Chair in Security Studies" at JHU SAIS, focusing on Korean Peninsula.
news.summary: On February 17, 2025, Dr. Mong-joon(MJ) Chung, the Honorary Chairman of the Asan Institute for Policy Studies, contributed $7.5 million to support research and educational initiatives focused on security matters concerning the Korean Peninsula. The donation aims to enhance efforts in this area and was made during Dr. Chung's visit to Johns...

news.headline: WM (NYSE: WM) declares $0.825 per share cash dividend payable on Mar. 28, 2025, to stockholders of record on Mar. 14, 2025.
news.summary: Houston-based WM (NYSE: WM) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.825 per share, with payment set for Mar. 28, 2025, to stockholders on record as of Mar. 14, 2025. WM, North America's top environmental solutions provider, operates under a people-first and integrity-driven approach. Formerly known as Waste Management, the company is headquartered in Houston, Texas, offering collection and re services through its subsidiaries. For more information, visit WM.com.

news.headline: Bank employee allegedly stole from safety deposit box, Mizuho investigating. More than $100,000 missing.
HYTN partners with A1 Cannabis to boost cannabis product production; aims to dominate beverage market.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2025, HYTN Innovations Inc. revealed its partnership with A1 Cannabis Inc., the owner of Summit Cannabis Beverages. HYTN, a company focused on pharmaceutical-grade cannabis manufacturing, joined forces with A1 to boost operational efficiency and grow their footprint in the cannabis beverage sector. This collaboration marks a significant move for both companies and signifies a strategic step towards broader market reach. HYTN is listed on the CSE as HYTN, on the FSE as 85W0, and on the OTC PINK as HYTNF.

news.headline: Police in Australia discover stash of stolen items including $50,000 worth of Pokemon cards and 6 Bitcoin ATMs. Four arrested.
news.summary: Four individuals have been apprehended for reportedly looting trading cards valued at $50,000, in addition to seizing firearms, car keys, and six cryptocurrency ATMs.

news.headline: Exodus Movement's offer to acquire Banxa Holdings Inc. has expired without agreement. NYSE American: EXOD, TSXV: BNXA.
news.summary: A prominent self-custodial cryptocurrency platform, Exodus Movement, Inc. (NYSE American: EXOD), based in Omaha, Nebraska, revealed that its bid to acquire all the existing common shares of Banxa Holdings Inc. (TSXV: BNXA) has concluded fruitlessly. The announcement was made on February 17, 2025. The deal, which aimed at taking over Banxa, ended without reaching a consensus between the two companies.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines to reduce workforce by 15%, impacting primarily corporate employees in the first layoffs in 53 years.
news.summary: The company announced that layoffs, the initial round of widespread job cuts in the airline's 53-year existence, will primarily impact corporate staff members.

news.headline: Chinese animated film Ne Zha II surpasses 12 billion yuan, approximately $1.66 billion at global box office.
news.summary: The Chinese animated film Ne Zha II has made a significant impact worldwide, exceeding 12 billion yuan (about $1.66 billion) in box office revenue as of February 17, 2025. This success has propelled Ne Zha II beyond The Lion, solidifying its position as a blockbuster hit in the film industry.

N-able (NYSE:NABL) to host Q4 earnings conference call on March 3, 2025 at 8:30am ET._financial results for 2024 will be discussed live. Visit http://investors.n-able.com for webcast.
news.summary: N-able, Inc., a worldwide software company (NYSE:NABL), assisting IT service providers in offering security, data protection, and endpoint management solutions, revealed a conference call scheduled to review its financial performance for Q4 and full-year 2024 at 8:30 a.m. ET on March 3, 2025. The live webcast of this call can be accessed on N-able's Investor Relations site at http://investors.n-able.com. The company will also provide a replay of the call for those unable to join initially.
